title: lasthenia chrysantha
intro: Lasthenia chrysantha, also known as goldfields, is a flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may be attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Lasthenia chrysantha can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
